_notes: Hand-curated by reading the US Core Observation Lab differential (5 elements) and snapshot (51 elements) line by line against the R4 Observation snapshot (50 elements). Note: us-core-observation-lab inherits from us-core-observation-clinical-result which itself inherits from R4 Observation. Profile-level drifts include inherited constraints (us-core-1, us-core-2) and elements constrained in the parent profile (status, category, subject, effective[x], dataAbsentReason) that are visible in the final snapshot. Key R4 facts: status min=1 required:observation-status|4.0.1; category min=0 preferred:observation-category; code min=1 example:observation-codes; subject min=0 Reference(Patient|Group|Device|Location); effective[x] min=0; value[x] min=0; dataAbsentReason min=0; specimen min=0 Reference(Specimen).

drifts.description: Constraint 'us-core-2' added (severity: error): If there is no component or hasMember element then either a value[x] or a dataAbsentReason must be present. Inherited from us-core-observation-clinical-result parent profile; not present in R4 base Observation.
MustSupport added in target (min=1 in R4 -> conformance-critical). Binding unchanged: both use required:observation-status (R4 has version pin |4.0.1 which is preserved in the snapshot, not removed).
Cardinality changed: [0..*] -> [1..*]. At least one category becomes mandatory. R4 allows an Observation without any category.
MustSupport added in target (min becomes 1 -> conformance-critical).
Slicing added on category: discriminator type=pattern, path=$this, rules=open. No slicing exists in R4 base.

Mandatory slice 'us-core' added: min=1, max=1. Requires exactly one category coded as 'laboratory' from http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/observation-category. No equivalent slice exists in R4 base.
MustSupport added on mandatory slice 'us-core' (min=1 -> conformance-critical). patternCodeableConcept fixed to system=http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/observation-category code=laboratory.
MustSupport added in target (min=1 in R4 -> conformance-critical).

Binding changed: R4 uses example strength to http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/observation-codes. US Core tightens to extensible strength with http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/ValueSet/us-core-laboratory-test-codes (LOINC laboratory codes). Binding strength tightened: example -> extensible.
Cardinality changed: [0..1] -> [1..1]. Subject becomes mandatory; R4 allows an Observation without a subject.
MustSupport added in target (min becomes 1 -> conformance-critical).
Reference target profile constrained: R4 allows Reference(Patient|Group|Device|Location). US Core restricts to Reference(us-core-patient) only.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).

Constraint 'us-core-1' added (severity: error): DateTime must be at least to day (length >= 10 characters). Inherited from us-core-observation-clinical-result parent profile; not present in R4 base Observation.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).

Constraint 'us-core-3' added (severity: error): SHALL use UCUM for coded quantity units. Expression: value.ofType(Quantity).system.empty() or value.ofType(Quantity).system = 'http://unitsofmeasure.org'. Inherited from us-core-observation-clinical-result parent profile; not present in R4 base Observation.
Constraint 'us-core-4' added (severity: warning): SHOULD use SNOMED CT for coded Results. Not present in R4 base Observation.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional but must be supported when present).
Reference target profile constrained: R4 allows Reference(Specimen). US Core restricts to Reference(us-core-specimen).

Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to Observation.category:us-core in target profile. Marks this slice as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement. No equivalent element in R4 base.
Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to Observation.code in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.
Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to Observation.value[x] in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.
Element-level USCDI requirement annotation extension (uscdi-requirement=true) added to Observation.specimen in target profile. Marks this element as a US Core Data for Interoperability requirement.
